title: US Stock Market Highlights: Dow slides 1,600 points, S&P 500, Nasdaq post biggest single-day losses since 2020 - CNBC TV18
reasoning: This article describes a significant risk-off shock in the US stock market, with the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq posting their biggest single-day losses since 2020. The article also mentions the US dollar experiencing its largest single-day decline on record, which is likely to drive safe-haven demand for the dollar.
